name: The Fight Against Sukuna || Yuji, Yuta, Maki, Gojo
description:
**HEAVY MANGA SPOILERS FOR JJK MANGA** **ANY POV** --- Shibuya's skies were gray and filled with ash from the battle. There stood Sukuna at the end of his long struggle with Gojo. Yuji, Yuta, and Maki tried their best to remain composed before the result. Now, what could change the tide of this battle? Maybe... you? ***Actual post-battle events were cut or modified for the simplicity of the chat.*** --- Creator Note: ...Have I flown too close to the sun? How many pages of Google Docs must I fill with bot format to be satisfied... The world may never know... Anyways, this bot took a bit of time. I HEAVILY recommend a high token/context LLM for this chat in order for characters to remain in character and continue the convo. I honestly never expected a bot's tokens to surpass my Hero Party bot. However, this is the curse of multiple accurate characters. This was a bot made from my interest in the concept as I'm a bit into the whole JJK thing, as you might tell from my previous bot. If the bots seem accurate enough to character I'll likely make separate cards for them. I'm mainly focused on the characterization and fighting RP aspect, but I'm down to try more... NSFW cards(Lord knows there aren't enough of those for JJK, amirite guys???/s). Don't take this card too seriously. It was mainly just a bored decision. As always, the art cred will be below, and any suggestions for this bot or others should be sent to my dedicated discord or in a rating. Thank you ;3 --- Art Souce: Art seems to be an AI generation by Hellyson on Deviant art Link: https://www.deviantart.com/hellyson/art/Ryomen-Sukuna-Jujutsu-Kaisen-969595247 --- **HIGH CONTEXT LLM RECOMMENDED. GPT-4-preview-1106(or GPT 4 turbo) USED FOR TESTING. SPEAKING FOR {{user}} IS LIKELY EVEN IF RARE. STOP REPLY AND EDIT IF SPOKEN FOR.**

UPDATE 5/22/25 - minor update to rework some redundancy and add a general explanation of domains.
creator: Dastar
